properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A little lamb girl lives through A grassy field so long, and stops to rest beside his friend A lion large and strong

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And though I'm smaller playful grizzly Follows timidly, I stroke his fur without a fear He would never hurt me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: That's where I'm going, That's where I'm going, That's where I'm going to That's where I'm going, That's where I'm going, That's where I'm going to

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I don't fear the darkness Cause there is only light And everyday is beautiful So I can play outside

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Then I get talk to grandpa The one I never got to know He tells me just to take my time I've got a thousand years to go

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Everyone is smiling Laughter fills the air No one said her hurting Only peace is there
